failure_signal: contrast threshold too high for target viewing distance
graphics_decision: increase contrast, reduce fine detail, or change display mapping

failure_signal: local pixel equality conflicts with judged lightness/color
graphics_decision: preview in context and avoid isolated color picking
synthetic_test: equal center swatches in different surrounds

failure_signal: metric depth cue and ordinal cue imply different order
graphics_decision: align shadows, horizon, object scale, and stereo
synthetic_test: ground plane plus familiar-size and shadow manipulations

graphics_decision: raise sample rate, add motion blur, or avoid high-frequency spokes
synthetic_test: rotating periodic wheel sampled at frame rate

graphics_decision: encode urgent states with a single strong feature
risk: object state is hard to find

failure_signal: actual screen visual angle differs from render frustum
graphics_decision: control viewer position or adjust projection
